data.name: 誘人的姐姐
data.detailed_description:
遊戲中影片製作與授權:18cmSam
遊戲製作:Bananaking


◆故事


你是一個大學生，趁著假期來到表哥的家中玩幾天，怎料表哥的老婆，你的表嫂姐姐十分的性感誘人且飢渴。同時表哥又有急事需要工作出差一段時間，於是在接下來的7天里，在溫柔性感姐姐的誘惑下，你徹底淪陷。。。。。。

◆玩法


在游戲中可以從兩位姐姐中選擇一位去進行游戲。

隨著劇情的發展，可以沉浸式的代入男主角視角，去感受體驗這一段與姐姐的美妙經歷。

◆遊戲特色


◇132段全動態CG，動態CG時長共計80多分鐘
◇游戲文字8500多字
◇兩位主要女主角，一位主要男主角，一位次要男配角
◇御姐誘惑，輕度NTR愛情題材的游戲
◇游戲結局：一個



Tools for game production：Acgcreator
Tools for creating 3dcg and 3D animation ：Virtamate

data.short_description: 【誘人的姐姐】是一款3D互動游戲，在游戲中你扮演一個剛剛放假的大學生，你的表哥把你帶到了他家中游玩，在表哥的家中你遇到了表哥的老婆。面對性感誘人的表嫂你害羞的打著招呼：“姐姐好！”。而姐姐也逐漸表現出飢渴的一面，並與你產生出了一段難以忘懷的美妙邂逅。。。。。。
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 泰文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Seductive Sister
data.detailed_description:
In-Game Video Production and Licensing:18cmSam
Game Production:Bananaking


◆Story


You are a university student, take advantage of the holidays to play a few days at your cousin's home, how come your cousin's wife is very sexy and seductive and hungry. At the same time, the cousin has an urgent need to work travel for a period of time, so in the next 7 days, in the tenderness of the sexy sister's temptation, you fell completely 。。。。。。

◆How to play


In the game, you can choose which of the two sisters you want to play with.

As the story unfolds, you can take the hero's perspective and share this wonderful experience with your sister.

◆Game features


◇132 fully dynamic CG segments, total dynamic CG duration is over 80 minutes.
◇The game text is over 8500 words.
◇Two female main protagonists, one male main protagonist and one male secondary ◇supporting character.
◇The game has a light NTR love theme with an alluring girl.
◇Game ending: one



Tools for game production：Acgcreator
Tools for creating 3dcg and 3D animation ：Virtamate

data.short_description: 【Seductive Big Sister】 is a 3D interactive game, in the game, you play a newly released college student, your cousin took you to his house to play, in the his house, you met the sexy cousin's wife. And your sister gradually shows her hunger and thirst and has an unforgettable encounter with you 。。。
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, German, Russian, Thai, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
